title: veronica cymbalaria var. freyniana
intro: Veronica cymbalaria var. freyniana, also known as Rock Jasmine or Small Wallflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Veronica family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Veronica cymbalaria var. freyniana include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
